innateAbility.name: Prickly
innateAbility.description: Grants both outgoing damage amplification and debuff duration amplification against enemy units behind Bristleback.

abilities.name: Viscous Nasal Goo
abilities.description: Covers a target in snot, causing it to have reduced armor and movement speed. Multiple casts stack and refresh the duration.

abilities.name: Quill Spray
abilities.description: Sprays enemy units with quills dealing damage in an area of effect around Rigwarl.Deals additional bonus damage per current stack on the debuff-affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Bristleback
abilities.description: Rigwarl takes less damage if he is hit on the sides or rear.

abilities.name: Hairball
abilities.description: Coughs a quill-packed hairball toward and erupts at the point-targeted location.

abilities.name: Warpath
abilities.description: Grants self flat bonus attack damage and bonus movement speed every time Rigwarl casts a spell.

talents.left: +18 Warpath Attack Damage Bonus per Stack
+8% Bristleback Back Damage Reduction+4% Bristleback Side Damage Reduction
